privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Webots world containing 4 Propeller nodes under a DELIVERY_DRONE robot. Verified that the expected aerodynamic parameters (thrust_x = 0.00015, torque_x = 0.000006, threshold = 75.0) perfectly match the task instructions, setup scripts, and verifier logic. The verifier accurately enforces a 5% tolerance and expects the modified world file to be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/tuned_quadcopter.wbt.
